name: auto-ppt-prototype
description: Open-source AI-agent-ready PowerPoint workflow for planning, revising, validating, and rendering PPTX decks.

scripts.generate:prompt: node generate-from-prompt.js --prompt "Create an 8-slide AI product strategy deck for executives in a professional tone"
scripts.generate:mock: node generate-from-prompt.js --mock --prompt "Create an 8-slide AI product strategy deck for executives in a professional tone"
scripts.generate:source: node generate-from-prompt.js --mock --prompt "Create an 8-slide AI workspace strategy deck for executives" --source sample-source-brief.md
scripts.revise:mock: node revise-deck.js --mock --deck output/generated-deck.json --prompt "Compress this deck, make it more conclusion-driven, and emphasize the execution plan"
